name: Killer Snake
author: Poki
description: Killer Snake is a game where you learn how to deal with different types of snakes. It’s created by Swipe Fighters. Try to survive in as many countries as possible and extract venom from many different species in this exciting adventure game! How to play: Don’t get bitten while extracting venom. Hold down the left mouse button, point it towards the snake’s head and release it just before the snake charges at you. About the creator: Killer Snake is created by Gamerce , the team behind Swipe Fighter Heroes , SoulSpark , Jumping Jaxx and Time Quiz . They are based in Denmark.
